list.empty: No articles yet. Create the first one with the "New article" button.

editor.lockedNotice: Editing locked in state {{state}}. To modify metadata or body, reopen as draft first.
editor.fieldHeroHelper: Absolute URL of the 4:3 image already uploaded to the assets bucket. Required before sending to review.
editor.fieldResponsibleEditorPlaceholder: Numeric ID of the responsible human editor
editor.creationHelper: Articles always start in ES. The EN translation is generated from the AI panel afterwards.
editor.deleteConfirm: Delete article? Only allowed in DRAFT state.
editor.msgArticleCreated: Article created. Continue filling in the language-specific fields and body in the ES/EN tabs.
editor.unsavedConfirm: You have unsaved changes in {{locale}}. Discard them?
editor.translationMissing: This translation doesn't exist yet. Generate it from the AI panel with a bilingual JSON, or write the body below and press "Save body" to create it.
editor.fieldBodyPlaceholder:
# Title

Write the body in markdown...
editor.errSaveSeo: Could not save the SEO fields
editor.slugInvalid: Invalid format: lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only

ai.title: AI assistant (Claude Cowork — bilingual schema 2.0)
ai.advancedHelper: Advanced: discrete runs for specific cases or debugging.
ai.runsEmpty: No runs yet. Create one above.
ai.selectedEmpty: Pick a run from the list or create a new one.
ai.errCopyManual: Select the text manually and copy (Ctrl/Cmd+C).
ai.jsonBilingualPlaceholder: Paste here the full JSON that Cowork returns. It must contain the keys shared and locales.es and locales.en.
ai.applyHelper: Atomic operation: the backend validates the JSON against schema 2.0, updates the ES and EN translations, updates the shared metadata, and leaves the article ready for review.
ai.errModelId: Declare the exact modelId that ran (e.g. claude-opus-4-7).
ai.errRawEmpty: Paste the bilingual JSON before validating.
ai.errLoadRuns: Could not load the AI runs
ai.errApply: Could not apply the JSON to the article
ai.msgRunCreated: Run {{runType}} created (id={{id}}). Copy the prompt, run it in Claude Cowork and paste the bilingual JSON below.
ai.msgApplied: Article updated with the bilingual translation. Review the ES and EN tabs.
ai.msgRejected: JSON rejected by validation ({{errors}} errors). Fix and retry.
ai.msgConflict: Operation rejected: the article is in a non-editable state.
ai.msgClientJsonValid: JSON is valid. Ready to apply.
ai.msgClientJsonInvalid: The JSON has a format error and was not sent to the server.
ai.msgClientJsonHint: Make sure double quotes inside strings are escaped (\") or use curly typographic quotes “…”.
ai.msgClientJsonEmpty: Paste the bilingual JSON before verifying.

checklist.title: Ready to send to review
checklist.subtitle: The backend requires all these fields to be present before transitioning DRAFT → IN_REVIEW.
checklist.subtitleProgressive: Follow the editorial outline. Once all steps are completed, you can send the article to review.
checklist.allReady: All fields complete. You can send to review.
checklist.allReadyProgressive: All set. Press 'Send to review' to continue.
checklist.someMissing: {{count}} field(s) still pending before you can send to review.
checklist.flowSubtitle: Follow the CMS editorial flow. The highlighted step is what comes next; completed steps appear dimmed.
checklist.step1Hint: Fill in the initial slug, initial title and shared metadata, then press 'Create article'.
checklist.step2Hint: Press 'Generate full article' in the AI Assistant panel, copy the prompt to the clipboard and run it in Cowork. Wait for the bilingual JSON.
checklist.step3Hint: Paste the bilingual JSON in the AI Assistant panel, press 'Validate and apply'. Then open 'Preview' to check the rendering.
checklist.step4Hint: Once you've reviewed the content, press 'Send to review' above to freeze the version and move it to the approval flow.
checklist.step5Hint: Press 'Publish' above to make the article visible on the public blog.
checklist.terminalPublished: Article published. The editorial flow is complete.
checklist.invariantsWarning: Some fields are still pending before you can send to review:

confirmModal.errInputRequired: This field is required to continue.

history.title: History
history.versionsEmpty: No versions yet. One is created when you send to review.
history.versionLocaleEmpty: This version has no body for this language.

transitions.retractConfirm: Retract this article? Visitors will get 410 Gone and it will disappear from the sitemap. The operation can't be reversed from the UI.
transitions.confirmGeneric: Confirm the transition to {{to}}? The operation can't be reversed from the UI.
transitions.blockedByChecklist: The preventive checklist is blocking the review submission: complete every field to enable the button.
